title: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel
display_title: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel
wikitext:
[]: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 15, 2021 4:10 am I'm working on an EvaGuide, if you will, together with a friend. An unexpected roadblock is that I don't find wjat's mentioned in the subject. I expected "3rd Angel" to just be written on one of Nerv's screens. But I just don't find it. Or is it that what is mentioned is Shamshel being the fourgh, and thus we can deduce Sachiel was 3rd? Please don't waste time on this. If you can't recall it's fine.

[]: Re: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel             Quote Post by Berserker » Mon Feb 15, 2021 5:00 am Shamshel gets both Misato's mentioning as well as being addressed as the 4th angel on Nerv's screen. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 15, 2021 5:05 am Thank you so much!!

Article: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel
[]: Need help finding mention of Sachiel being the 3rd Angel             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 15, 2021 4:10 am I'm working on an EvaGuide, if you will, together with a friend. An unexpected roadblock is that I don't find wjat's mentioned in the subject. I expected "3rd Angel" to just be written on one of Nerv's screens. But I just don't find it. Or is it that what is mentioned is Shamshel being the fourgh, and thus we can deduce Sachiel was 3rd? Please don't waste time on this. If you can't recall it's fine.
